تمت إضافة عرض نسبة مئوية فوق زر «العلاج السريع» يُظهر النسبة المئوية لسعة المستشفى التي يشغلها الجنود الجرحى.

1. Updated the World Boss feature.

3. Fixed several bugs.

title: Yalla Baloot & Hand
notes:
1. Royal Privileges Upgrade - Unlock more exclusive perks and showcase your distinguished status!
2. Medal System Upgrade - A refreshed interface design, an expanded chat room medal, and more honors waiting for you to unlock!
3. Chat Room Exclusive Packs - Daily exclusive benefits featuring super value offers + free gift packs. Remember to claim yours daily!

title: Gin Rummy Stars - Card Game
notes:
Hey Gin Rummy Fans! 

We’ve shuffled the deck and dealt a brand-new update to make your card-playing experience smoother, faster, and more exciting than ever. Here is what’s waiting for you in the latest version.

title: Zynga Poker: Texas Holdem Game
notes:
NEW: Zynga Poker Cup! It’s your season to score! Prepare to represent your country in the ultimate poker showdown. Get ready to take your shot and win big!
Buddy Bonus: We’ve upgraded gifting! Having more buddies now means bigger rewards and massive multipliers every time you spin!
Experience smoother gameplay with various bug fixes and performance improvements

title: War Drone: 3D Shooting Games
notes:
Big Quality-of-Life Update!

● Improved notification reminders
● New clan joining flow
● Enhanced layouts and UI scaling for newer devices and resolutions
● Fixed issues caused by destroying choppers stunned by the Stun Shot
● Upgraded Sidewinder missile tracking - air targets can no longer escape!
● New missions - Mission 47 is available now!

Stay tuned for more content updates — more missions arriving soon!

title: MadOut 2: Grand Racing games
notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
- Angel

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.

title: Match Factory!
notes:

New items are coming every 2 weeks! Be sure to update your game to get the latest content!

title: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
notes:
NEW PACKS WITH FRESH LEVELS!

Jul 06 - WEEKEND ROAD TRIP Pack: Pack your bags, fuel up the car, and explore 100 adventurous levels!
Jul 20 - TATAMI ROOM Pack: Embrace timeless rituals, discover hidden beauty, and explore 100 harmonious levels!
Aug 03 - MIDNIGHT MASQUERADE Pack: Don an elegant mask, glide down moonlit canals, and explore 100 romantic levels!

And don't miss the new TREASURE PASS season kicking off July 1!

Update regularly so you never miss fresh levels, events & surprises!

title: Big Fish Casino: Slots Games
notes:
IT’S SUMMER – Prepare for a refreshing new setting.
KEEP YOUR COOL – Jump straight into your first slot—no delays, no downloads.
A SPLASH OF PARADISE – A smoother, more refined experience awaits.

title: Kingdom of Desert
notes:
[Important Features Overview]
1. New Cross-server Event– Alliance Hegemony is now live!
6 alliances will compete in 5 rounds of group stage matches. The matches take place across 3 lanes in a flag-capturing battle that will test the limits of team strategy and combat power. Come and fight for the glory of your alliance!
2. New Event - Vein Rush is now live!
Mineral veins never run dry! Capture Ruins and fight for rare resources.
3. Mythic Hero "Narok" Arrives!

title: Free Fire MAX
notes:
[9th Anniversary] New 3D party lobby, themed rewards, and more ways to celebrate with friends!
[Themed BR] Factory becomes a limited-time anniversary venue. Anniversary quests, zone upgrades, and on-site revival await.
[Skill Boost] Some skills now feature new upgrade paths.
